    \label{tab:ablation}

    \begin{tabular}{lrr}
    \toprule

    \midrule
    \textsc{SkillGraph} & \textbf{90.6} & \textbf{84.4} \\
    \midrule
    w/o Graph Structure  & 89.9 & 72.7 \\
    w/o Graph-aware Ret. &  59.4    &  79.7  \\
    w/o Graph Evolution &  78.2  &  70.3 \\
    w/o Cold-Start SFT   &  73.4  &  67.2  \\
    \bottomrule
